title: phuryn/pm-skills
summary: A marketplace of 100+ agentic skills, commands, and plugins covering the entire product lifecycle from discovery through strategy, execution, launch, and growth. Designed for product managers but applicable to anyone managing AI-driven workflows. 16.9k stars, gained 4,839 stars this week.
chinese_summary: 一个提供 100+ Agent 技能、命令和插件的市场，覆盖从产品发现到战略、执行、发布和增长的完整产品生命周期。面向产品经理设计，但也适用于管理 AI 驱动工作流的任何人。1.69 万星，本周新增 4839 星。
